blended.narrative: Anthony Lakes is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,981 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 2.8" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 11".
